caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red and white patterned bowtie, glasses, and a tall, grey, styled wig speaks into a professional microphone. He wears large black headphones over his wig and a gold watch on his left wrist. He is seated in a room with a background featuring clothing racks, white mannequins, and framed photographs. To his left is a microphone with a black pop filter, and in front of him is a logo that reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". In the background, a yellow sign with the word "LEE" is visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera remains static. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene.
